name: Form
description: A form component built on React Hook Form with compound pattern. Provides Form.Item for field-level validation display, label alignment, and consistent form layout with Zod schema integration.
usage_guidelines: Wrap form fields with Form.Item for label, validation, and layout.
Use with React Hook Form useForm and zodResolver.
Set labelWidth or layout on Form to control all items.
Use Form.Item asterisk prop to indicate required fields.

labelWidth.description: Default label width for horizontal layouts.

size.description: Default size for all form controls.

Form.Item.description: Wrapper for individual form fields. Provides label, validation message, and layout.

invalid.description: Whether the field is in an invalid state.

styling_info.visual_description: Form with configurable layout. Horizontal layout shows labels to the left, vertical stacks them above fields, inline puts them in a row.

Do: Use with React Hook Form and Zod for validation
Use Form.Item for consistent label and error display
Set layout on Form to control all items at once
Dont: Don't handle validation manually — use React Hook Form
Don't forget asterisk prop for required fields
